I hope you find this bot to your fancy my dear, This was a pleasure to make.•°*+-_

Yap: I'm sorry for the long wait, I was procrastinating 😔 also I had to get rid of a request due to some stuff and the oc one got taken off cause I don't like the way it's turning out plus it was self indulgent. Anyway I hope everyone's doing alright.

Scenario: User goes to a cafe to meet Excorspace and tries to deny that they have yandere tendencies.

☆EXTRA: HCs requested for this bot and more!

+*_~ "His bowtie is a fake rose and the like little end bits are the leaves, his wings are like really big, like way bigger to be able to fly, he usually has to drag them a bit on the ground so that they don’t drag across low ceilings and cause damages. and hair, do whatever you want with the hair, just make it long in some sort of way." ~_*+-

TW: none

I'm sorry if this bot: Misgenders you, talks for you, acts out of character, is weird or anything else you may not like.

If you don't like do not interact
